content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: skew_tolerance
C: gt(abs_delta,300) ∧ provider_skew_unaccounted ∧ valid_webhook_rejected
V: skew_within_bounds ∧ delta_recalculated
A: min_fix ∧ patch_threshold ∧ reg_test ∧ edge_ts_valid

[AUDIT]
Goal: skew_tolerance.
Constraints: gt(abs_delta, 300) and provider_skew_unaccounted and valid_webhook_rejected.
Verify: skew_within_bounds and delta_recalculated.
Answer target: min_fix and patch_threshold and reg_test and edge_ts_valid.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: grace_boundary
C: overdue_flag ∧ grace_window_"24h" ∧ charge_loop_guard
P: emit_"402" ∧ skip_retry_within_"24h" ∧ reset_on_pay
V: boundary_once ∧ idempotent_check
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: grace_boundary.
Constraints: overdue_flag and grace_window_"24h" and charge_loop_guard.
Plan: emit_"402" and skip_retry_within_"24h" and reset_on_pay.
Verify: boundary_once and idempotent_check.
Answer target: min_fix and reg_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: default_arch
C: team_size_"9" ∧ ddl_"12 weeks" ∧ store_"PostgreSQL" ∧ compliance_ready
P: modular_monolith ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ platform_plus_sec
V: steady_traffic ∧ single_deploy_unit
A: bounded_modules_now ∧ extract_services_later

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: lean_mlops_platform
C: team_of_"6" ∧ ddl_"9 weeks" ∧ async_enrichment ∧ pt_mlops
P: "PostgreSQL"_store ∧ worker_sidecar_split ∧ job_queue_async
V: six_devs ∧ "9 weeks" ∧ pt_mlops
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: file_download_handler
P: sanitize_query∧resolve_realpath∧validate_base_dir
V: traversal_blocked∧path_confined
A: strip_dotdot∧enforce_basedir_prefix

[AUDIT]
Goal: file_download_handler.
Plan: sanitize_query and resolve_realpath and validate_base_dir.
Verify: traversal_blocked and path_confined.
Answer target: strip_dotdot and enforce_basedir_prefix.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: sql_injection_risk
C: unsanitized_input ∧ dynamic_sort_clause ∧ "SELECT" ∧ direct_concatenation
V: test_malicious_"sort" ∧ confirm_allowlist_enforced
A: block_merge ∧ require_input_validation

[AUDIT]
Goal: sql_injection_risk.
Constraints: unsanitized_input and dynamic_sort_clause and "SELECT" and direct_concatenation.
Verify: test_malicious_"sort" and confirm_allowlist_enforced.
Answer target: block_merge and require_input_validation.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: reconcile_batch
C: async_await ∧ minimal_change ∧ ordered_pipeline
P: load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics
A: wrap_async ∧ "next(err)" ∧ preserve_order

[AUDIT]
Goal: reconcile_batch.
Constraints: async/await and minimal_change and ordered_pipeline.
Plan: load_batch and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and db.save and emit_metrics.
Answer target: wrap_async and "next(err)" and preserve_order.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: loadGatewayUser
C: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log
V: minimal_change ∧ order_preserved

[AUDIT]
Goal: loadGatewayUser.
Constraints: session_check and db.findUser and flags.load and audit.log.
Verify: minimal_change and order_preserved.
